title: OREGON WILDFIRE RESPONSE AND RECOVERY WEBSITE - 211info
text: OREGON AND WASHINGTON WILDFIRE INFORMATION OREGON WILDFIRE RESPONSE AND RECOVERY WEBSITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about current wildfires and air quality. Offers a resource directory for wildfire preparation, response, and recovery. Includes evacuation information and a sign-up for emergency alerts through OR-Alert. Provides a list of verified organizations collecting donations for people impacted by wildfire. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Ahmaric, Arabic, Chinese, English, French, Hindi, Hmong, Japanese, Korean, Nepali, Russian, Somali, Swahili, Thai, Ukranian, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disaster Donations Coordination Disaster Preparedness Information Disaster Related Clothing/Emergency Supplies Disaster Related Shelter Services Disaster Service Centers/Hotlines Disaster Services for Animals Emergency Preparedness and Response Training Evacuation Centers Evacuation Information Evacuation Transportation Fire Advisories Fire Conditions Bulletins Fire Prevention Information General Disaster Information Road Closures Bulletins Search Dogs Smog Alerts State Offices of Emergency Services Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - CENTRAL OREGON FIRE INFORMATIONAL WEBSITE DISASTER SERVICES - NORTHWEST WILDFIRE INTERACTIVE WEB MAP DISASTER SERVICES - OREGON OFFICE OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT EVACUATION MAP DISASTER SERVICES - REAL-TIME ASSESSMENT AND PLANNING TOOL FOR OREGON MATERIAL GOODS - FIRE HARDENING GRANT PROGRAM PUBLIC SAFETY - OREGON SMOKE INFORMATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
